user.title: Add a LoRaWAN application
user.description: Pick the LoRaWAN platform that hosts your WT101 thermostats. After adding the application you can add multiple thermostats under it without re-entering credentials.

ttn.title: TTN application
ttn.description: The Things Stack v3 server URL, application ID, and API key. The credentials are validated by listing devices in this application.

chirpstack.title: ChirpStack credentials
chirpstack.description: ChirpStack v4 server URL and API token.

chirpstack_app.title: Pick a ChirpStack application
chirpstack_app.description: Choose the application that contains your WT101 thermostats, or pick Manual entry to type the application ID directly.

chirpstack_webhook.title: ChirpStack HTTP integration
chirpstack_webhook.description:
Add an **HTTP integration** to this ChirpStack application and paste the URL below as the *Endpoint URL* (uplink event). Use *JSON* as the payload encoding.

**Webhook URL:**
```
{webhook_url}
```

Make sure the Milesight WT101 codec is loaded on the device profile so `temperature` and `target_temperature` are decoded into the `object` field.

Click **Submit** to finish.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the server. Check the URL, credentials, and network.

abort.already_configured: This LoRaWAN application is already configured.

init.title: ChirpStack HTTP integration
init.description:
Paste this URL into the ChirpStack application's HTTP integration as the *Endpoint URL* (uplink event), JSON encoded.

**Webhook URL:**
```
{webhook_url}
```

abort.no_webhook: This hub has no webhook configured (TTN hubs do not use a webhook).

user.title: Add a WT101 thermostat
user.description:
Set the name and limits. Credentials are inherited from the parent application.

The sensor pickers are **optional** — leave them empty for ChirpStack hubs that use the HTTP integration (the climate entity is updated directly by the webhook). For TTN, or if you already have sensors from another integration, pick them here.

device.title: Pick the thermostat device
device.description: WT101 devices are listed first (matched on Milesight brand and WT101 model in TTN, or "WT101" in the ChirpStack device profile name). Pick a device or choose Manual entry.

manual.title: Manual device id
manual.description: Type the TTN device ID or ChirpStack device EUI.
